system.description: Your body sleeps while your mind, riddled with industrious bees, marches on. Gain access to the Delve skill. Once per session, while on a delve, you can opt to fall asleep and let the bees inside your body steer you. In this state, the bees speak for you and perform actions on your behalf -roleplay accordingly (the GM can use Fortune fallout to represent your inhuman pilots). Assuming you get a few hours' rest and progress on the delve, refresh D6 from any of your resistances.
